title: Tactical help wanted

posts.author: jaacquees (Jacques Barouhiel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All

We are looking for some tactical help with a few integrations/automations.

We have a ASP.NET Core Web API which we started developing and which takes care of a few automations that aren’t readily available in Monday, as well as some light front end development (forms to interact with some parts of the API).

We are looking for someone who can start helping before september.

Thanks

jaacquees

posts.author: tpaktop (Maxim Filimonov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
What kind of help do you need?
